mapper.select: select ifnull((select total_effective_minutes from room_user_study_stats where user_id = #{userId}), 0)
select code, name, need_minutes as needMinutes, perk_desc as perkDesc, sort_order as sortOrder from room_medal_def order by sort_order asc

select m.medal_code as code, d.name, m.unlock_time as unlockTime, m.redeemed from room_user_medal m join room_medal_def d on m.medal_code = d.code where m.user_id = #{userId} order by m.unlock_time desc
mapper.insert: insert ignore into room_user_medal (user_id, medal_code, unlock_time, redeemed) values (#{userId}, #{code}, now(), '0')
mapper.update: update room_user_medal set redeemed = '1' where user_id = #{userId} and medal_code = #{code}
mapper.select: select ifnull(count(1), 0) from room_user_medal where user_id = #{userId} and redeemed = '1'
mapper.insert: insert into room_medal_def (code, name, need_minutes, perk_desc, sort_order) values (#{code}, #{name}, #{needMinutes}, #{perkDesc}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.update: update room_medal_def set name = #{name}, need_minutes = #{needMinutes}, perk_desc = #{perkDesc}, sort_order = #{sortOrder} where code = #{code}
